lines.english: How did Roy stop the thieves?
lines.chinese: 罗伊是怎样制止小偷的？
lines.raw: How did Roy stop the thieves? | 罗伊是怎样制止小偷的？

lines.english: Roy Trenton used to drive a taxi.
lines.chinese: 罗伊·特伦顿以前是开出租车的。
lines.raw: Roy Trenton used to drive a taxi. | 罗伊·特伦顿以前是开出租车的。

lines.english: A short while ago, however,
lines.chinese: 然而，不久前，
lines.raw: A short while ago, however, | 然而，不久前，

lines.english: he became a bus driver
lines.chinese: 他当上了一名公共汽车司机，
lines.raw: he became a bus driver | 他当上了一名公共汽车司机，

lines.english: and he has not regretted it.
lines.chinese: 他一点也不后悔。
lines.raw: and he has not regretted it. | 他一点也不后悔。

lines.english: He is finding his new work far more exciting.
lines.chinese: 他觉得自己的新工作更加激动人心。
lines.raw: He is finding his new work far more exciting. | 他觉得自己的新工作更加激动人心。

lines.english: When he was driving
lines.chinese: 最近，当他开着车
lines.raw: When he was driving | 最近，当他开着车

lines.english: along Catford Street recently,
lines.chinese: 沿卡特福德大街行驶时，
lines.raw: along Catford Street recently, | 沿卡特福德大街行驶时，

lines.english: he saw two thieves rush out of a shop
lines.chinese: 他看见两个小偷从一家商店里冲出来，
lines.raw: he saw two thieves rush out of a shop | 他看见两个小偷从一家商店里冲出来，

lines.english: and run towards a waiting car.
lines.chinese: 朝一辆等在那里的汽车跑去。
lines.raw: and run towards a waiting car. | 朝一辆等在那里的汽车跑去。

lines.english: One of them was carrying a bag full of money.
lines.chinese: 其中一个提着一满袋钱。
lines.raw: One of them was carrying a bag full of money. | 其中一个提着一满袋钱。

lines.english: Roy acted quickly and drove the bus
lines.chinese: 罗伊迅速行动，
lines.raw: Roy acted quickly and drove the bus | 罗伊迅速行动，

lines.english: straight at the thieves.
lines.chinese: 把公共汽车径直朝小偷开去。
lines.raw: straight at the thieves. | 把公共汽车径直朝小偷开去。

lines.english: The one with the money got such a fright
lines.chinese: 拿钱的那个小偷吓了一大跳，
lines.raw: The one with the money got such a fright | 拿钱的那个小偷吓了一大跳，

lines.english: that he dropped the bag.
lines.chinese: 把袋子都弄掉了。
lines.raw: that he dropped the bag. | 把袋子都弄掉了。

lines.english: As the thieves were trying to get away in their car,
lines.chinese: 当小偷们试图乘车逃跑时，
lines.raw: As the thieves were trying to get away in their car, | 当小偷们试图乘车逃跑时，

lines.english: Roy drove his bus into the back of it.
lines.chinese: 罗伊开着公共汽车撞在小偷汽车的尾部。
lines.raw: Roy drove his bus into the back of it. | 罗伊开着公共汽车撞在小偷汽车的尾部。

lines.english: While the battered car was moving away,
lines.chinese: 就在那辆被撞坏的汽车开走的时候，
lines.raw: While the battered car was moving away, | 就在那辆被撞坏的汽车开走的时候，

lines.english: Roy stopped his bus and telephoned the police.
lines.chinese: 罗伊停下公共汽车给警察打了电话。
lines.raw: Roy stopped his bus and telephoned the police. | 罗伊停下公共汽车给警察打了电话。

lines.english: The thieves' car was badly damaged and easy to recognize.
lines.chinese: 小偷的汽车已严重受损，很容易辨认。
lines.raw: The thieves' car was badly damaged and easy to recognize. | 小偷的汽车已严重受损，很容易辨认。

lines.english: Shortly afterwards,
lines.chinese: 不久，
lines.raw: Shortly afterwards, | 不久，

lines.english: the police stopped the car and both men were arrested.
lines.chinese: 警察截住了那辆汽车，两名男子都被捕了。
lines.raw: the police stopped the car and both men were arrested. | 警察截住了那辆汽车，两名男子都被捕了。
